AddCLSTopicDomains.title: Adding one or more domains to a specified log topic

AddCdnDomain.document: This example shows you how to add an acceleration domain name.
AddCdnDomain.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cdn.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: AddCdnDomain
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Origin": {
        "OriginType": "ip",
        "Origins": [
            "1.1.1.1"
        ]
    },
    "ProjectId": "0",
    "Domain": "www.test.com",
    "ServiceType": "web",
    "Area": "mainland"
}
AddCdnDomain.title: Adding an acceleration domain name

DescribeCdnDomainLogs.document: This example shows you how to query the log list for a DNS query domain name in a specified time period.
DescribeCdnDomainLogs.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cdn.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: DescribeCdnDomainLogs
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Domain": "www.test.com",
    "EndTime": "2019-09-04 12:00:00",
    "StartTime": "2019-09-04 00:00:00"
}
DescribeCdnDomainLogs.title: Log Download Link Query

DescribeCdnIp.title: Querying IP information

DescribeCertDomains.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cdn.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: DescribeCertDomains
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Cert": "\\u65e0"
}
DescribeCertDomains.title: Getting configurable domain names in an SSL certificate

DescribeDomainsConfig.title: Query Domain Name Detailed Configuration

DescribeMapInfo.title: Querying the mappings between a district or an ISP

ListClsLogTopics.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cdn.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: ListClsLogTopics
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Channel": "cdn"
}
ListClsLogTopics.title: Querying the list of log topics

ListClsTopicDomains.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cdn.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: ListClsTopicDomains
<Common request parameters>

{
    "TopicId": "d2256449-c6ff-421b-93ef-aa3a7dde2de2",
    "LogsetId": "6d04373b-ba59-4a4f-a96e-9fe53b59a536",
    "Channel": "cdn"
}
ListClsTopicDomains.title: Searching for Domain Names Bound to a Topic

ManageClsTopicDomains.title: Managing the list of domain names under log topic

ModifyDomainConfig.document: This example shows you how to update the origin server configuration of a domain.
ModifyDomainConfig.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cdn.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: ModifyDomainConfig
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Domain": "www.test.com",
    "Route": "Origin.Origins",
    "Value": "{\"update\":[\"1.1.1.1\"]}"
}
ModifyDomainConfig.title: Updating the Origin Server Configuration of a Domain

ModifyDomainConfig.document: This example shows you how to update the Origin-Pull Timeout configuration for a domain.
ModifyDomainConfig.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cdn.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: ModifyDomainConfig
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Domain": "www.test.com",
    "Route": "OriginPullTimeout",
    "Value": "{\"update\":{\"ConnectTimeout\":10,\"ReceiveTimeout\":10}}"
}
ModifyDomainConfig.title: Updating the Origin-Pull Timeout Configuration for a Domain

ModifyDomainConfig.document: This example shows you how to update the origin-pull connection timeout for a domain.
ModifyDomainConfig.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cdn.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: ModifyDomainConfig
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Domain": "www.test.com",
    "Route": "OriginPullTimeout.ConnectTimeout",
    "Value": "{\"update\":10}"
}
ModifyDomainConfig.title: Updating the Origin-Pull Connection Timeout for a Domain

ModifyDomainConfig.document: This example shows you how to update the server certificate ID (automatically generated during SSL certificate management for certificate hosting).
ModifyDomainConfig.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cdn.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: ModifyDomainConfig
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Domain": "www.test.com",
    "Route": "Https.CertInfo.CertId",
    "Value": "{\"update\":\"0VpOXiPz\"}"
}
ModifyDomainConfig.title: Updating the HTTPS Server Certificate ID (Automatically Generated during SSL Certificate Management for Certificate Hosting)

PurgePathCache.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cdn.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: PurgePathCache
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Paths": [
        "http://www.test.com/test/"
    ],
    "FlushType": "flush"
}
PurgePathCache.title: Submitting a directory purge task

PushUrlsCache.title: Preheating URL

UpdateDomainConfig.document: This example shows you how to update domain configuration.
UpdateDomainConfig.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cdn.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: UpdateDomainConfig
<Common request parameters>

{
    "ProjectId": 0,
    "Domain": "www.test.com"
}
UpdateDomainConfig.title: Updating Domain Configuration
